3037120.name: Mercenaries of War
3037120.description:
Mercenaries of War is a modern hardcore crime based PvP MMO with permanent death and legacy system.

Mercenaries of War was originally created with one thing in mind; create a positive hardcore PvP game environment with full development transparency and be actively involved in the player community to create the ultimate hardcore experience together.

Start off doing small crimes and illegal activities and earn your rep. Stock up on bullets and grab a gun to protect yourself. Participate in many activities such as group heists, hit the casinos, buy a property and make money off other players.

Make some allies and form a crew. If the Boss and Underboss of a crew dies, the crew is taken out and all remaining members dropped. Getting ready for a crew war? Crew management can distribute bullets to all members to ready for war. Permanent death is ruthless and Mercenaries are always hunting. Be careful out there.

Will you come out on top or will you be left 6 feet under? Decide your legacy.
